h1: What is Zhong Sheng Ji? The Ancient Taoist Living Tomb Ritual Fully Explained
heroSub: A 3-generation Taiwan Feng Shui lineage, ordained Taoist master, exclusive dragon vein plot — serving clients across China, Malaysia and Singapore

sections.h2: Definition: What is Zhong Sheng Ji (Sheng Ji)?

items.h3: Sheng Ji Defined: Placing a Living Person's Essence in a Dragon Vein
items.content: Zhong Sheng Ji (種生基), also known as 'Sheng Ji', 'Living Tomb' or 'Life-Base Feng Shui', is a traditional Taoist geomancy ritual. While the person is still alive, a master selects a true dragon vein plot (Long Xue) and buries the person's hair, nail clippings, blood and a garment in the earth. This creates a permanent energetic bond between the living person and the dragon vein's earth qi (di qi), continuously elevating the person's destiny.

items.h3: Historical Origins: Over 1,000 Years of Secret Imperial Tradition
items.content: Sheng Ji dates back to the Tang and Song dynasties in China, when it was a closely guarded secret practised exclusively by emperors, generals and wealthy merchant families. Only the most accomplished Feng Shui masters were entrusted with selecting Sheng Ji plots. In modern times, the tradition has been preserved within select Taiwanese Feng Shui family lineages, including the Lin family of Zi Xin Ge, who have maintained the practice across three generations.

items.h3: Sheng Ji vs Traditional Yin Zhai (Ancestral Tomb) Feng Shui
items.content: Yin Zhai Feng Shui (陰宅風水) involves selecting burial plots for deceased ancestors to benefit their descendants. Sheng Ji, by contrast, is performed for living persons — the beneficiary experiences the effects themselves, during their own lifetime. Results typically begin manifesting within 1 to 6 months of completion, making it one of the fastest-acting destiny-improvement methods in the Taoist tradition.

sections.h2: The 9 Core Benefits of Sheng Ji

items.h3: Career & Official Fortune (催官): Promotions, Opportunities, Influential Allies
items.content: The dragon vein plot we use — the 'Fu Gui Shuang Quan' plot in Taiwan — carries natural official-rank energy (官貴之氣), as confirmed by classical Feng Shui texts: 'Even if not top of the imperial exams, at least third place.' This makes career advancement and the emergence of helpful, powerful people in one's life one of the most pronounced outcomes of Sheng Ji.

items.h3: Wealth Activation (招財進祿): Opening Financial Channels
items.content: The plot's external water configuration — with the Danshui River, Dahan River and Xindian River all flowing inward toward the plot — creates what classical texts call a 'counter-current wealth formation' (逆水朝堂). Ancient texts state this configuration produces wealth 'as fast as a rising official'. Clients seeking financial breakthroughs consistently report this as the most visibly impactful direction.

Sheng Ji is also sought for longevity (增壽), warding off misfortune and danger (保命化煞), improving marriage prospects (求婚), and supporting fertility (求子). The ritual's Day 1 ceremony includes a full disaster-dispelling sequence that clears accumulated negative energies from the person's fate chart, laying the foundation for all nine benefit directions.

sections.h2: How Long Until Sheng Ji Takes Effect?

items.h3: Month 1: Facial Complexion and Energy Levels Visibly Improve
items.content: According to Master Lin's multi-decade observations, the first noticeable change is physical appearance: the forehead (tianmen), third eye area (yintang) and tip of the nose (bi zhun) take on a naturally radiant glow. People around the client often remark unprompted that the person looks healthier or more vibrant. This is the first visible signal that the dragon vein's earth qi has begun nourishing the client.

items.h3: Months 1–3: Helpful People Appear, Obstacles Clear
items.content: After the initial physical signs, destiny-level changes begin manifesting: previously stalled matters start moving forward, beneficial people appear at key moments, and the effort required to achieve desired outcomes noticeably decreases. As Master Lin's teaching states: 'After Sheng Ji, modest effort produces visible results' — meaning the threshold for success is lowered, not that effort is no longer needed.

items.h3: Months 3–6: Career and Financial Improvements Become Concrete
items.content: For clients focused on career advancement or financial growth, concrete changes typically emerge within 3 to 6 months: salary increases, successful business negotiations, new income sources, or significant promotions. The counter-current water formation of the Fu Gui plot accelerates financial outcomes in particular, consistent with its classical designation as a 'fast wealth' configuration.

items.h3: Do I Need to Travel to Taiwan for Sheng Ji?
items.content: For the 5-Year Experience package (RMB 72,000), no travel to Taiwan is required. You prepare four items — hair, nail clippings, blood drops on absorbent paper, and a worn garment — and mail them to the authorised agent, Mr. Liang Dongrong (WeChat: NSDG521). He forwards them to Master Lin in Taiwan, where the full 2-day ceremony is performed. The dragon-qi infused garment, a pure silver ingot, and the full ceremony video are then mailed back to you.

items.h3: How Do I Verify the Authenticity of a Sheng Ji Master?
items.content: Three core checks: First, confirm a clear, traceable Taoist ordination record — Master Lin Jiā Huá was ordained by the 64th Zhang Tianshi in 2007 within the Lü Shan lineage, verifiable and specific. Second, confirm the existence of a real dragon vein plot with land ownership documentation. Third, request unedited full-length ceremony videos from previous clients. Any service provider who cannot satisfy all three should be avoided.

The earth qi of the dragon vein continuously elevates the person's career, wealth, health and longevity while they are still alive.

mainEntity.name: How long does Sheng Ji take to show effects?

acceptedAnswer.text: Facial complexion improves within 1 month; helpful people and cleared obstacles appear within 1–3 months; concrete career and financial improvements emerge within 3–6 months.

mainEntity.name: Do I need to travel to Taiwan for Sheng Ji?

acceptedAnswer.text: For the 5-Year package (RMB 72,000), no travel is needed — mail your 4 items to the authorised agent. The Lifetime package (RMB 500,000) requires personal attendance in Taiwan.
